brief: Today's news highlights White House involvement in an FBI investigation of Times reporters, a fatal bonfire incident in Belfast, and a heatwave in the UK, while research papers introduce tools for missing data imputation and AI-assisted crime linkage analysis.
news_summary: The White House directed FBI Director Patel to oversee an investigation involving Times reporters; a man died after falling from an Eleventh Night bonfire in Belfast; heatwave conditions persist in England and Wales; and China braces for a second typhoon in a week.
papers_summary: Notable papers include ImputeViz for diagnosing missing data, a study on AI use in crime linkage analysis, and CompoVista for compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Today's news highlights White House involvement in an FBI investigation of Times reporters, a fatal bonfire incident in Belfast, and a heatwave in the UK, while research papers introduce tools for missing data imputation and AI-assisted crime linkage analysis.
en.news_summary: The White House directed FBI Director Patel to oversee an investigation involving Times reporters; a man died after falling from an Eleventh Night bonfire in Belfast; heatwave conditions persist in England and Wales; and China braces for a second typhoon in a week.
en.papers_summary: Notable papers include ImputeViz for diagnosing missing data, a study on AI use in crime linkage analysis, and CompoVista for compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 中国遭遇一周内第二场台风，大规模疏散；德国宣判华人跨国性侵案。国际新闻聚焦美国政治、AI版权争议及中东局势。研究方面，多篇论文探讨可视化、犯罪关联分析及中国传统文化数字化。
zh.news_summary: 台风巴威登陆中国东部，浙江疏散近200万人，台湾15万户停电。德国宣判“德国老司机驾校”Telegram跨国性侵案，多名中国籍主犯落网。
zh.papers_summary: 本日研究包括缺失数据可视化工具ImputeViz、AI在犯罪关联分析中的应用、脑机接口临床试验，以及基于知识图谱的中国传统绘画可视化分析框架。

todays_image.caption: The historic telegram, a once-revolutionary method for transmitting urgent directives, mirrors today's story of the White House issuing a direct order to Patel, highlighting how the core act of sending authoritative messages endures across
todays_image.title: Telegram
